sections.paragraph:
Ζμύρνα (OGI 458, 41 [c. 9 b.c.]; PRyl 153, 18 [II a.d.]; coins of Smyrna since the time of Trajan) v.l. for Σμύρνα, q.v.—M-M.

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

PRyl PRyl = Catalogue of the Greek Papyri in the John Rylands Library—List 4

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 429
